subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! What bounty is this, and what grace is this, and what favour is this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء این چه موهبتست و این چه عنایت و این چه فضلست و این
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @growth of the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
